title: N-Hydroxy-N, N'-diphenylformamidine as Gravimetric Reagent for Pd(II), Cu(II) and Ni(II)
author: R. C. AGARWAL
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Chemical Laboratories, D. Jain College, Baraut (Meerut) 

  Manuscript received 10 July 1974; revised 2 December 1975 ; accepted 6 December 1975  

 N-Hydroxy-N, N'-diphenylformamidiae has been used as a gravimetric reagent for Pd(II), Cu(ll) and Ni(ll) at  p H 2.0, 3.0 and 5.5 respectively. The complexes have 1:2 metal-ligand composition.
